title: Pogalam Lyrics MS Dhoni
stanzas:
idhu thaana antha pon neram
idho boomi ullangai oram
indha nodiyil nee naan podhume

unnodu naanum karaiya
ennodu neeyum karaiya
ondraai kadhalodu pogalaam

naal dhorum sandhipome
namakkaaga jeevipome
innum konja dhooram pogalaam
innum pogalaam

en vaanil naaldhorum minnal
aanal en vaazhkkai un kannil
nee kaatum kan jaadai kandu
thadumaarum nimidangal undu

yedhedho ini nee pesa
viral korthu innum pesu
un vaarthaigalil vaazhgiren

unnodu naanum karaiya
ennodu neeyum karaiya
ondraai kadhalodu pogalaam

naal dhorum sandhipome
namakkaaga jeevipome
innum konja dhooram pogalaam
innum pogalaam

nenjil un sudu moochu theendum
nimisham athu eppothum vendum
yaarum ingillaatha ulagil
irande ven paravaigal naame
naan inge pul veliyaaga
nee vanthaai nun paniyaaga

unnodu naanum karaiya
ennodu neeyum karaiya
ondraai kadhalodu pogalaam

naal dhorum sandhipome
namakkaaga jeevipome
innum konja dhooram pogalaam
innum pogalaam

seo.title: Pogalam Lyrics MS Dhoni
seo.description: Full Pogalam songs lyrics, MS Dhoni Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Pa Vijay, Music: Amaal Malik, Singer(s): Sreeramachandra.
seo.keywords: Pa Vijay, MS Dhoni, Amaal Malik, Sreeramachandra, Pogalam full lyrics, MS Dhoni songs lyrics, Pogalam lyrics snippets, Pogalam WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Pogalam lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pogalam?

Pogalam expresses themes of love and separation, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters in the movie MS Dhoni.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in MS Dhoni, highlighting the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic aspirations.

Who is the singer and music director of Pogalam?

The song is sung by Sreeramachandra and composed by Amaal Malik.

When was Pogalam released?

Pogalam was released on September 30, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pogalam, the protagonist reflects on love and the bittersweet moments of life, encapsulating the essence of longing and connection. The song's lyrics, penned by Pa Vijay, beautifully convey the emotions of separation and hope. With Sreeramachandra's melodious voice and Amaal Malik's captivating music, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This heartfelt melody serves as a poignant reminder of the complexities of love, making it a standout track in MS Dhoni.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pogalam from MS Dhoni captures the essence of love and longing with its heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody. Sreeramachandra's soulful voice, combined with Amaal Malik's enchanting composition, creates a magical experience that resonates deeply with listeners. This song is a perfect blend of romance and nostalgia, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: This is the time, that moment, here on this earth, in this moment, you and I are together.
You and I can unite, you and I can come together, let's go with love.
We will meet again someday, we will live for each other, let's go a little further, let's go.
In my sky, there are many moments like lightning, in my life, your eyes show me paths and there are moments that can change everything.
Whatever it is, now you speak, I will hold on, still speaking, I live in your words.
You and I can unite, you and I can come together, let's go with love.
We will meet again someday, we will live for each other, let's go a little further, let's go.
In my heart, your sweet breath is needed for a moment, it is always needed, there are no other birds in this world, you came here as a rain and I as a flower.
You and I can unite, you and I can come together, let's go with love.
We will meet again someday, we will live for each other, let's go a little further, let's go.
